case_title: LYDIA A. YAFFE VS. PATRICIA O'SULLIVAN

docket_entries.description: SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST LYDIA A. YAFFE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUN-04-2013, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-24-2013. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-04-2013 CONTINUED TO AUG-06-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). ***NOTE: IF THERE IS NO PROOF OF SERVICE, ANSWER OR DEFAULT AND PAYMENT OF OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS BY THE AUG-06-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, THE COURT INTENDS TO DISMISS THE MATTER.*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
